name: Trade and Development Bank (TDB)
description: African Investor. TDB is a specialized investment grade bank financing trade and projects in Eastern and Southern Africa.

## THE TRADE & DEVELOPMENT BANK IS AN
AGILE INSTITUTION; A GLOBAL & REGIONAL
CONNECTOR, AND A DYNAMIC
VALUE CREATOR
![](https://www.tdbgroup.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/tdb-logowhite.png)
![](https://www.tdbgroup.org/wp-content/uploads/layerslider/TDB-Home-Page-Slider/Website-slide-2.jpg)![](https://www.tdbgroup.org/wp-content/uploads/layerslider/TDB-Home-Page-Slider/Website-slide-2.jpg)
## We strive to be at the forefront of
extending development capital and services to advance
sustainable regional growth, integration and
prosperity through customer focused
and innovative financing solutions
![](https://www.tdbgroup.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/tdb-logowhite.png)

## WE SYNERGIZE WITH OUR
ECOSYSTEM; ENSURING THAT
ALL OUR PROJECTS PRIORITIZE AND
COMPLY WITH ENVIRONMENTAL
STIPULATIONS
![](https://www.tdbgroup.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/tdb-logowhite.png)

## WITH EXCITING FINTECH
INNOVATIONS, WE’RE LEAPING
FORWARD WITH GREATER
EFFICIENCY
![](https://www.tdbgroup.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/tdb-logowhite.png)

## LIKE THE VIBRANT WILDEBEEST,
WE NAVIGATE THE AFRICAN
SAVANNAH; WEATHERING THE
ELEMENTS AND ENRICHING THE
CIRCLE OF LIFE AS WE GO FORTH.
